rationale: Physics at L3 maps closely to arXiv's section structure but the modern field deserves splits arXiv doesn't make: quantum simulators distinct from quantum hardware; gravitational waves split from astrophysics; many-body strongly-correlated split from topological matter. Thirty-eight leaves cover the major working communities. Cosmology, gravitational waves, and quantum information each get their own depth because each is publishing at journal-volume that warrants it.

subfields.name: Topological & Quantum Matter
subfields.tagline: Topological insulators, Weyl/Dirac semimetals, topological superconductors.

subfields.name: Strongly Correlated Electrons
subfields.tagline: Hubbard models, quantum criticality, heavy fermions, frustrated magnets.

subfields.name: Superconductivity (Conventional & Unconventional)
subfields.tagline: Cuprates, iron-based, nickelates, hydrides, mechanism studies.

subfields.name: Magnetism & Spintronics (CM)
subfields.tagline: Skyrmions, altermagnets, spin transport, magnonics.

subfields.name: Moiré & 2D Materials Physics
subfields.tagline: Twisted bilayers, moiré superlattices, 2D heterostructure physics.

subfields.name: Collider Experiments (LHC and Successors)
subfields.tagline: ATLAS/CMS/LHCb physics results, Higgs precision, BSM searches.

subfields.name: Beyond Standard Model Theory
subfields.tagline: SUSY, composite Higgs, axions theory, dark sector models.

subfields.name: Neutrino Physics
subfields.tagline: Oscillations, mass, neutrinoless DBD, neutrino astrophysics.

subfields.name: Dark Matter Direct Detection
subfields.tagline: DM direct searches, axion searches, sub-GeV DM detectors.

subfields.name: Cold Atoms & Quantum Gases
subfields.tagline: Optical lattices, BEC/Fermi gases, quantum simulators with atoms.

subfields.name: Quantum Optics & Cavity QED
subfields.tagline: Photonic quantum experiments, cavity QED, single-photon physics.

subfields.name: Precision Measurement & Clocks
subfields.tagline: Atomic clocks, fundamental constants, EDM searches in AMO.

subfields.name: Ultrafast & Attosecond Physics
subfields.tagline: Attosecond science, free-electron lasers, ultrafast XUV.

subfields.name: Superconducting Qubits & Circuits
subfields.tagline: Transmon and fluxonium qubits, gate fidelity, surface code experiments.

subfields.name: Trapped-Ion Quantum Computing
subfields.tagline: Ion-trap qubits, gate operations, scalable ion-trap architectures.

subfields.name: Photonic & Neutral-Atom QC
subfields.tagline: Photonic quantum computing, neutral-atom arrays, Rydberg quantum.

subfields.name: Quantum Error Correction & Fault Tolerance
subfields.tagline: Surface codes, LDPC quantum codes, fault-tolerant primitives.

subfields.name: Quantum Sensing & Metrology
subfields.tagline: NV centers, quantum magnetometers, entanglement-enhanced sensing.

subfields.name: Exoplanets
subfields.tagline: Detection, characterization, atmospheres (JWST), habitability.

subfields.name: Stellar Astrophysics & Star Formation
subfields.tagline: Stellar evolution, star formation, asteroseismology, stellar populations.

subfields.name: Galactic & Extragalactic Astrophysics
subfields.tagline: Galaxy formation, AGN, galactic dynamics, supermassive black holes.

subfields.name: Transients & Multi-Messenger Astronomy
subfields.tagline: Supernovae, kilonovae, GRBs, FRBs, time-domain surveys.

subfields.name: CMB & Large-Scale Structure
subfields.tagline: CMB analysis, LSS surveys, BAO, structure formation.

subfields.name: Dark Energy & Dark Matter (Cosmology)
subfields.tagline: Dark energy probes, structure-based dark matter constraints, modified gravity.

subfields.name: Early Universe & Inflation
subfields.tagline: Inflation, primordial non-Gaussianity, gravitational-wave cosmology.

subfields.name: Heliophysics & Solar Physics
subfields.tagline: Solar wind, coronal physics, solar magnetism, space weather.

subfields.name: Planetary Atmospheres
subfields.tagline: Atmospheres of solar-system planets, comparative planetology.

subfields.name: Nuclear Structure & Reactions
subfields.tagline: Exotic nuclei, nuclear structure theory, reaction theory.

subfields.name: Hadron Physics & Lattice QCD
subfields.tagline: Lattice QCD, hadron spectroscopy, hot/dense QCD matter.

subfields.name: Complex Networks & Statistical Physics
subfields.tagline: Network science from physics angle, epidemic models in networks.

subfields.name: Soft Matter & Active Matter
subfields.tagline: Soft matter physics, active matter, colloids, granular physics.

subfields.name: Biological Physics
subfields.tagline: Physics of cells, motors, collective behavior in biology.

subfields.name: Magnetic Confinement Fusion
subfields.tagline: Tokamaks, stellarators, plasma turbulence, ITER physics.

subfields.name: Inertial Confinement & High-Energy-Density Physics
subfields.tagline: ICF, NIF results, HED physics, laboratory astrophysics.

subfields.name: Gravitational-Wave Physics
subfields.tagline: GW data analysis, waveform modeling, LISA science.

subfields.name: General Relativity & Black Hole Physics
subfields.tagline: Black hole shadow, GR tests, ringdown, alternatives to GR.

subfields.name: Quantum Gravity & Strings
subfields.tagline: String theory, holography, loop quantum gravity.

subfields.name: Turbulence & Geophysical Fluid Physics
subfields.tagline: Turbulence theory, geophysical flows, ocean/atmosphere physics.

subfields.name: Instrumentation & Detector Physics
subfields.tagline: Particle/photon detector design, calibration, electronics, DAQ — tracking, calorimetry, cryogenic detectors.

subfields.name: Applied Optics, Photonics & Imaging
subfields.tagline: Laser systems, fiber optics, adaptive optics, computational imaging — photonic devices, optical metrology.

uncovered_concerns: Applied & Instrumentation Physics L2 has no L3 leaves — accelerator/detector papers fold into the closest experimental leaf (LHC, neutrino, etc.).
Did not split Magnetism into magnetism-CM vs spintronics-EE — both treated under magnetism-spintronics-cm here; EE applications live in Electrical Engineering.
